title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 230.230 - Powers of commission
text:
230.230.  Powers of commission. — In all counties adopting sections 230.200 to 230.260, all powers and duties heretofore exercised by the county commission, township boards, and special road district commissioners relating to the improvement, construction, reconstruction, restoration and maintenance of roads shall be exercised by the county highway commission.
(L. 1971 H.B. 105 § 7)
